subcodes.first_line: There was a man by the name of Mahmud who used to speak ill of people.
subcodes.first_line_orig: محمود نامی بود که بحق مردم بد میگفت جمال مبارک نصیحتش فرمودند
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @idle talk; backbiting; speaking ill of others, @stories; anecdotes, @Adam; Adam and Eve
